name: Sidama Selection
description: High-clarity washed and vibrant natural lots from the Sidama highlands.

name: Yirgacheffe Selection
description: Classic floral and citrus tea-like coffees from the birthplace of washed processing.

name: Guji Selection
description: Elegant and fruity naturals from the dense forests of Guji.

name: Harar & Limu Selection
description: Wild, winey Harar naturals and balanced, sweet Limu washed lots.
